calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rowena Navia for Leo Bautista (Administrator).

Ms. Navia stated that there is no news on John Castillo's location, that they have spoken with family members, that her thought is that he does not want to be found and that they contacted the hospital where he was previously. The Court granted the First and Final Report and Account, etc. (subject to review of the order). The Court dispenses with notice to John Castillo. John's share will go to the San Francisco County Treasurer.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
